creator: Andrew@FreeBSD.org
text:
Building at different optimisation levels I've found it's only a problem at -O1. After disabling various passes I found adding -fno-dse would allow the code to be built, indicating a problem with the dead code elimination pass.

NetBSD had the same problem with a prerelease [1], but this appears to be fixed when they imported the 4.8.3 release.

[1] http://gnats.netbsd.org/cgi-bin/query-pr-single.pl?number=48841
